evals.prompt: I'm on Scandit SDK v6 and need to migrate my BarcodeCapture React Native integration to v7. Here's my scanner file: ScannerApp_v6.tsx
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, applies the 6→7 changes (mostly informational — scan intention default, codeDuplicateFilter default, BarcodeTracking→BarcodeBatch rename if applicable) to ScannerApp_v6.tsx, and summarizes all changes made.

assertions.text: Summary mentions the v7 default scanIntention change to Smart
Summary mentions the codeDuplicateFilter -2 default behavior change in v7.1+
BarcodeCapture.forContext( is still allowed (not removed in v7)
BarcodeCaptureOverlay.withBarcodeCaptureForView is still allowed (not removed in v7)
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey is still allowed (not removed in v7)
A summary is shown describing changes

evals.prompt: We're upgrading our React Native app from Scandit SDK 7 to 8. Here's our BarcodeCapture code: ScannerApp_v7.tsx. Please apply any necessary changes.
evals.expected_output: The skill applies the v7→v8 renames (DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey → DataCaptureContext.initialize + sharedInstance, BarcodeCapture.forContext → new BarcodeCapture + addMode, BarcodeCaptureOverlay.withBarcodeCaptureForView → new BarcodeCaptureOverlay + addOverlay, dataCaptureContext.dispose() → dataCaptureContext.removeMode(barcodeCapture)) and summarizes the changes.

assertions.text: DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present in the output file
DataCaptureContext.sharedInstance is used to read the context
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is NOT present in the output file
new BarcodeCapture( is present in the output file
BarcodeCapture.forContext( is NOT present in the output file
dataCaptureContext.addMode( is called to attach the BarcodeCapture mode
new BarcodeCaptureOverlay( is present (or BarcodeCaptureOverlay.withBarcodeCaptureForView replaced)
dataCaptureView.addOverlay( is called for the BarcodeCaptureOverlay
dataCaptureContext.dispose() is NOT present (replaced with removeMode or removed entirely)
dataCaptureContext.removeMode( is present in the cleanup path
A summary is shown listing the renames
Summary mentions npx pod-install must be run after the package bump
The output file is functionally equivalent to the input otherwise — no unnecessary changes

evals.prompt: We need to upgrade our BarcodeCapture integration from SDK 6 all the way to v8. Here's our current code: ScannerApp_v6.tsx
evals.expected_output: The skill applies both migrations in order (6→7 then 7→8) and summarizes all changes organized by migration step.

assertions.text: DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present (7→8 rename applied)
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is NOT present
DataCaptureContext.sharedInstance is used to read the context
new BarcodeCapture( is present (7→8 rename applied)
BarcodeCapture.forContext( is NOT present
dataCaptureContext.addMode( is called
new BarcodeCaptureOverlay( is present
dataCaptureContext.dispose() is NOT present
dataCaptureContext.removeMode( is present in the cleanup
Summary covers both migration steps (references both 6→7 and 7→8)

evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my BarcodeCapture to the latest Scandit SDK version. Here's my code and package.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads package.json to detect v6.28.x, determines the target is v8, applies both migrations without asking the user for their version.

assertions.text: Summary mentions the detected version (6.28.x or v6)
Summary mentions the package.json dependency versions need to be bumped to ^8.0.0
Summary mentions npx pod-install must be run after the bump
DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present (7→8 rename applied)
new BarcodeCapture( is present (7→8 rename applied)
dataCaptureContext.addMode( is called
dataCaptureContext.dispose() is NOT present
Did not ask the user for their version — proceeded autonomously

evals.prompt: Migrate my BarcodeCapture overlay creation in ScannerApp_v7.tsx to the v8 idiom — I want the explicit `new BarcodeCaptureOverlay(...)` + `dataCaptureView.addOverlay(...)` form, not the legacy factory.
evals.expected_output: The skill replaces BarcodeCaptureOverlay.withBarcodeCaptureForView with new BarcodeCaptureOverlay(barcodeCapture) and adds dataCaptureView.addOverlay(overlay), and otherwise leaves the file untouched (the v7 surface is otherwise valid).

assertions.text: new BarcodeCaptureOverlay( is present in the output file
BarcodeCaptureOverlay.withBarcodeCaptureForView is NOT present
dataCaptureView.addOverlay( or viewRef.current.addOverlay is called for the overlay
A summary is shown listing the overlay rewrite
